creator: frederic@culot.org
text:
- update to 2.65
- p5-SQL-Statement and p5-MLDBM added as build dependencies
- minimum perl required version set to 5.8.0 with PERL_CONFIGURE
(as defined in vendor's Makefile.PL)
- post-patch target not required anymore so removed from Makefile
- pkg-plist updated

Tinderbox logs available at:
http://culot.org/tinderbox/7.3-FreeBSD/p5-Template-DBI-2.65.log
http://culot.org/tinderbox/8.1-FreeBSD/p5-Template-DBI-2.65.log

Changes: http://search.cpan.org/dist/Template-DBI/Changes
